description: Norwegian subsidiary of Kry/Livi providing video consultation platform connecting patients with doctors. Part of European Kry/Livi network operating across multiple markets.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients; B2B for employer health programs
key_investors: Index Ventures, Creandum, Accel, General Atlantic
competitive_advantage: Part of European Kry network, digital-first approach, brand recognition

varden_fit.rationale: Competitor in Norwegian telemedicine market - well-funded with European backing
